meta.title: About us — Saffron Electronics CI
meta.description: Discover the story of Saffron Electronics, your home appliance specialist in Abidjan for over 10 years.

heroSubtitle.before: Saffron Electronics is the must-have home appliance reference in Abidjan —

about.title: Over 10 years at your service
about.subtitle: Saffron Electronics was born from the vision of making quality home appliances accessible to all Ivorian households.
about.p1: Founded over 10 years ago, Saffron Electronics has established itself as one of the key references in home appliances in Abidjan. Our showroom, located at the Riviera Palmeraie roundabout near BICICI, welcomes hundreds of customers every day.
about.p2: We offer a complete range of home appliances: refrigerators, air conditioners, washing machines, televisions, and a wide selection of small appliances. All our products are sourced from the world's best brands and come with the manufacturer's warranty.
about.p3: Our commitment: to offer you the best products at the best prices, with exceptional customer service. Regular promotions of up to 40% discount further strengthen our accessibility.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide each of our actions, every day.

quality.title: Guaranteed quality
quality.desc: Original products from the world's best brands, with manufacturer warranty on all items.

trust.title: Established trust
trust.desc: Over a decade of loyal service. A reputation built on honesty and total transparency.

service.title: Complete service
service.desc: From showroom reception to after-sales service, our team supports you at every step.

price.title: Unbeatable prices
price.desc: Best rates negotiated directly with suppliers. Competitive prices without compromising on quality.

2013.title: Foundation
2013.text: Opening of the first store in Abidjan with a clear vision: democratizing access to quality home appliances.

2016.title: Expansion
2016.text: Showroom expansion and catalogue enrichment with the world's leading brands.

2019.title: Digital
2019.text: Launch of the online store to reach all of Ivory Coast and simplify the buying experience.

2024.title: Today
2024.text: A must-have reference in home appliances in Abidjan with over 5,000 loyal customers.

about.ctaSubtitle: Showroom open 7 days/7 · Riviera Palmeraie roundabout · Free personalized advice
